message:
fix: batch IN-clause queries in computeBlockedIDs to prevent Dolt CPU spikes

The bd ready path built unbatched IN clauses with thousands of
placeholders, causing Dolt to spike to 200%+ CPU and timeout on
connections. Apply the existing queryBatchSize=200 batching pattern
to all 5 unbatched sites: GetReadyWork NOT IN, spawner children,
closed children, getChildrenOfIssues, and getChildrenWithParents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
